channel.title: Sebastian K. Müller
channel.description: Recent content on Sebastian K. Müller

item.title: Curriculum Vitae
item.description: Please find here my latest academic CV.

item.title: Photos
item.description: I take my camera anywhere and I use it respectfully. Val Aupa in snow-rich winter 2020/21. Val Rosandra in early springtime. Around Laghi di Fusine, towards Canlone della Strugova. Val Saisera on one of these days. Val Alba in one of the longest day of the year. I caught a lightning on a photo.

item.title: PowderGuide
item.description: In the summer of 2023 me and croox.com started developing a weather service, dedicated to winter mountain activities, in particular skitouring and freeride, and it is operational ever since winter 2023/24 on powderguide.com. We process and visualize the ICON numerical weather forecasts run by the german weather service DWD. In its third version we are presenting these forecasts on a three-dimensional map. Your browser does not support iframes. Expedition Meteorology In spring of 2026 I started to prepare myself for working as expedition meteorologist.

item.title: Research
item.description: Peer-reviewed research articles: Segura, H., Pedruzo-Bagazgoitia, X., Weiss, P., Müller, S. K., Rackow, T., Lee, J., … & Stevens, B. (2025). nextGEMS: entering the era of kilometer-scale Earth system modeling. Geoscientific Model Development, 18(20), 7735-7761. Müller, Sebastian K., et al. (2023): The climate change response of alpine-mediterranean heavy precipitation events. Climate Dynamics (2023): 1-22. Müller, S. K., Caillaud, C., Chan, S., De Vries, H., Bastin, S., Berthou, S., … & Warrach-Sagi, K.
